description: Act on Rapture's triaged Markdown notes inside a Claude Code session. Fires opportunistically the next time you open Claude — no daemon, no per-message cost.

installs.name: SessionStart hook
installs.description: Fires when you next open Claude Code. Reports recent .md notes across the triaged subfolders (Notes, Links, Tasks, Ideas, Journal) and offers to act on them per CLAUDE.md. Composes with your normal Claude usage.
